title: Verify Mutual Exclusivity with Other Experiments
description: Test that a user who is assigned to the Trial Corner experiment is not concurrently shown any other onboarding or post-trial experiments.
preconditions: User is eligible for and assigned to the Trial Corner experiment.
There is another active experiment, such as a different onboarding flow.

steps.description: 1. Log in as the user assigned to the Trial Corner cohort.
2. Navigate through the standard user flow (homepage, content pages, etc.).
3. Verify the user sees the Trial Corner widget.
4. Actively look for UI elements or pop-ups related to other known, active experiments.

expected_result: The user is only exposed to the Trial Corner experience. No elements from other mutually exclusive experiments are visible, confirming the targeting rules are working correctly.
